description.en: Delegate your EGLD to Colombia Staking and earn staking rewards on the MultiversX network. Colombia Staking helps secure the blockchain while giving you a reliable way to grow your eGold holdings through delegation.
description.de: Delegiere dein EGLD an Colombia Staking und verdiene Staking-Belohnungen im MultiversX-Netzwerk. Colombia Staking hilft, die Blockchain zu sichern, und bietet dir eine zuverlaessige Moeglichkeit, deine eGold-Bestaende durch Delegation zu vermehren.
description.es: Delegate your EGLD to Colombia Staking and earn staking rewards on the MultiversX network. Colombia Staking helps secure the blockchain while giving you a reliable way to grow your eGold holdings through delegation.
description.fr: Delegate your EGLD to Colombia Staking and earn staking rewards on the MultiversX network. Colombia Staking helps secure the blockchain while giving you a reliable way to grow your eGold holdings through delegation.
description.ro: Delegate your EGLD to Colombia Staking and earn staking rewards on the MultiversX network. Colombia Staking helps secure the blockchain while giving you a reliable way to grow your eGold holdings through delegation.
description.it: Delegate your EGLD to Colombia Staking and earn staking rewards on the MultiversX network. Colombia Staking helps secure the blockchain while giving you a reliable way to grow your eGold holdings through delegation.
